introSection: Penguin Trek is a steel launched roller coaster for SeaWorld Orlando, in Orlando, Florida, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In the summer of 2023, pieces of track arrived at the park.

The addition of Penguin Trek was announced on September 28, 2023.

The lead car was unveiled at the 2023 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA on November 14, 2023.

In early February 2024, SeaWorld Orlando announced that track work was completed on the ride.

fullText:
Penguin Trek is a steel launched roller coaster for SeaWorld Orlando, in Orlando, Florida, USA.

In the summer of 2023, pieces of track arrived at the park.

The addition of Penguin Trek was announced on September 28, 2023.

The lead car was unveiled at the 2023 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA on November 14, 2023.

In early February 2024, SeaWorld Orlando announced that track work was completed on the ride.
